docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF NOV-21-2018 CONTINUED TO MAR-20-2019 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-14-2019 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE MAR-20-2019 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT COACHLIST, INC. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR NOV-21-2018 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-24-2018 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         OCT-29-2018
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF MAY-14-2019 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 63056592)
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100036473), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ON24, INC. SERVED AUG-03-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COACHLIST, INC.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED (TRANSACTION ID # 100037723) AS TO DEFENDANT COACHLIST, INC.
